PALLAVI
Hey nee ayya jagiraa
Chal maavaadochindra
Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

SECOND PALLAVI

Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa

snippet.title: Mortal Kombat II | Official Trailer II
snippet.description:
The wait is almost over! Mortal Kombat II arrives in theaters and IMAX May 8. #MortalKombatMovie #FilmedForIMAX

From New Line Cinema comes the latest high-stakes installment in the blockbuster video game franchise in all its brutal glory, Mortal Kombat II. This time, the fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

Karl Urban stars as Johnny Cage, alongside Adeline Rudolph, Jessica McNamee, Josh Lawson, Ludi Lin, Mehcad Brooks, Tati Gabrielle, Lewis Tan, Damon Herriman, with Chin Han, Tadanobu Asano as Lord Raiden, Joe Taslim as Bi-Han, and Hiroyuki Sanada as Hanzo Hasashi and Scorpion.

Director Simon McQuoid returns to helm the follow up to his explosive 2021cinematic adventure, from a screenplay by Jeremy Slater, based on the videogame created by Ed Boon and John Tobias. The film is produced by Todd Garner, E. Bennett Walsh, James Wan, Toby Emmerich and Simon McQuoid, and executive produced by Michael Clear, Judson Scott, Jeremy Slater, Ed Boon and Lawrence Kasanoff.

Joining McQuoid behind the camera are director of photography Stephen F. Windon, production designer Yohei Taneda, editor Stuart Levy and costume designer Cappi Ireland, with casting by Rich Delia and music by Benjamin Wallfisch. 

New Line Cinema Presents an Atomic Monster/Broken Road Production, a Fireside Films Production, Mortal Kombat II. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX® across North America on May 8, 2026, and internationally beginning 6 May 2026.

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.description:

https://alfan.link/fayezaldosri


إشترك وفّعل التنبيهات في قناة فايز الدوسري الرسمية للحصول على أحدث إصداراته الفنية
https://bit.ly/2OavIu6


فايز الدوسري - أسمع كلامي (حصرياً) | 2026
Fayez Aldosri - I Hear My Words (EXCLUSIVE) | 2026 


كلمات : تركي الميزاني
اداء : فايز الدوسري
مكس وتوزيع : أيمن مخاوي
جرافيك : ناصر البقمي


---------


- كلمات -

‎ياحرفي اللي ضاع مابين الدفاتر والرفوف
اللي رسمته من تنهَّاتي ومن حبر قلمي

ضحيت لجله في حروف وقمت لجله في حروف
وصبرت لو النار من فوقي ومن تحت قدمي

ياصاحبي اللي على شانك تحديت الضروف
اسمع كلامي زين وافهم وش اقوله من فمي

ماهو بأنا اللي تتركه بين الخناجر والسيوف
وتمص دمه بين خلق الله يامصاص الدمي

انا بدويٍ ماسكن في الوقت مسكان الضعوف
اتبع هوا بالي واسير عند ذودي وغنمي

طوفتها لك لجل خاطر عين ولا ماتطوف
ولا انت مهما زاد وزنك وزني يطرحك نسمي

صمتي يدل اني وفي ومسويٍ فيك امعروف
وصبري يدل اني من زحول الصناديد انتمي

ياقوم ياللي تذبحون الحيل قدرٍ للضيوف
وش رايكم في اللي يعشيني من اوصال لحمي

وقفت له يوم اجلسوا واجلستله ناسٍ وقوف
غير الذخيره والفشق في محزمه من محزمي

كلمات الشاره
‏يا مدور الحاجة وهي 
قدام عينك ما تشوف !؟
أحيان يغوينا الطريق 
وأحيان تعمينا الظروف 

من دور الضايع لقاه 
هي سنة الله في الحياة
 راهن على إحساسك وثق
وين ما يقول امشي وراه 

ا&&&&&&&&&

الاسم ضايع للأبد 
ولا يدورني أحد 
وانا ادور أي شيء 
يكتب لهذا البعد حد 

أحيان أسأل من أنا ؟
واموت غرق في حيرتي
وحين اشوف لمرايتي
اشوف واحد مش انا

كلن مضيع شي وانا
ضايع عليا كل شيء 
ولا بيدي بوصله 
تقدر توصلني لشي

snippet.description:

Subedaar Official Trailer 
Starring Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Saurabh Shukla, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh and Faisal Malik
Directed by Suresh Triveni
Produced by Vikram Malhotra, Anil Kapoor, Suresh Triveni
Written by Suresh Triveni, Prajwal Chandrashekar
An Opening Image Films Production, In association with Anil Kapoor Film & Communication Network

Official Release Date - March 5, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Set in the Indian heartland, the powerful masala action-drama follows Subedaar Arjun Maurya as he grapples with the challenges of leading a civilian life, navigates a strained relationship with his daughter and confronts societal dysfunction. Once a soldier who fought for the nation,
Subedaar must now battle enemies within to protect his home and family.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/

Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: Apekz - Tuldok
snippet.description:
Produced by @thisisneroph 

Intro 

My life ain't so bad  
You drive so fast  
To the silence, baby  
Don't trip, relax
And we'll be alright  
’Til the sunrise

Inakyat ko mataas na bundok
Di tumigil kahit mga paa ko mabugbog
kung kelan nakatungtong sa tuktok
Saka naman nagkaroon ng tuldok x2


Verse

Maraming nagaabang maraming nagtatanong
Kelan battle miss ka na namin mang baon
Bago ko sagutin kung bakit ba ganon
Ibalik muna natin sa dating panahon

Estranghero at Ramon, Yawzi at Pajutes
Datu vs Loonie eto snappy na salute
Hanggang sa maligaw kay eminem pati kay juice
Binge watch ng grind time pagka galing ko ng school

Rekta na kagad sa computer shop
Panahong di pa uso yung google maps 
Sina soundtrip yung freestyle ni supernat
Ako’y nahuli ng rap parang na-booby trap

Hanggang sa mapanuod yung cameltoe versus datu
Brand new ginanap sa quantum
Acapella parang dumbfoundead vs tantrum
Tagalog pa kaya yung dating ay naging times two

Tiningnan ko kung facebook sila
Gusto ko na malaman kung meant to be ba
Di lang na simple na asaran parang beh bote nga
Inisip lang yung legacy may a to z pa

2010 kalaban ko si harlem ty
 B A T T L E R A P
Komedyante na rapper parang michael v.
Nagapi nung unang salang pero ays lang gee

Ako ay og parang obe wan kenobi
Unang tf ko nun kay daddy joe d.
Five hundred pesos yung inabot kay toti
Pasimple lowkey palihim parang shinobi

Unang laban ko disisyete anyos
Nung natalo winning streak na pagkatapos
Pano pa pag yung degree ay nairaos
Rap ang pinili pinagisipan ng maayos

Pagbaba ng barko walang ng doubt
Nilaban ko kagad si bryan lao
Imbis na mag tiktik kalawang mamili ng weak na kalaban
Ang gusto ko peak na agad bakbakan sa south

Nababad ng husto lalong pinahusay
Isang dos por dos tatlong isabuhay
Naihanay ako sa mga tunay
Yung bata na nag solo flight dun sa malugay

Dumaan ang pandemya handa pa rin gumera
Kaso ba’t may hurado na nagpapalitan ng pera
Nag iba yung sistema walang tinatalo
Di na ata to yung liga na kilala ko

Fast forward twenty twenty two
Laban ko kay Sinio ready execute
Yung lugar sobrang grimey pwede mv shoot
Binuhos ko walang natira miski na residue

Dahil sa pustahan yung career ang tinaya ko
Ayoko lang yung sining natin parang ginagago
Galit yung ibang tao  
Pero may resibo, meron video garapalan na hindi na tinatago

“Yari ka pati yung presidente binangga mo”
Alam kong pwedeng kahinatnan ng ginawa ko
Buti kahit papano meron pinagbago
At di totoo na matagal ko na yun pinaplano

“Kung meron kang problema dapat kinausap mo”
Malapit na yung battle nung nadagdag yun sa sulat ko
Ipapaalam ko pa ba yun kay Anygma
Battle emcee din sya ulo pa ng liga

Yung pagkatalo raw kay gorio ay dinadamdam
di nakuha kampeonato na inaasam
liga ay sinasaktan tanginang pustahan yan
dahil sa utang na loob hinahayaan lang 

Yung pusta isang milyon alam kong talo na’ko
Dagdag mo pa gawain nung mga hurado
Tensionado, emosyon, pressure halo-halo
Kaya sa entablado nagmukha akong barumbado

Lumipas ang tatlong taon
Siguro nawala yung mga tampo ngayon
Fliptop anniversary nag ayang pumunta don
Para magpakumbaba at masabi ko yung rason

Walang driver si loons kaya di nakasabay
Sumama ako kay zaki sa grab ay sumakay
Kahit di imbitado pumunta pasaway
Para personal mag sorry at makipagkamay

Bumili ng sariling alak at ng mangunguya
Para di masabi na ang kapal naman ng mukha
Nandun din lahat ng pasimple na nangungutya
Pero balewala gold label yung tinutungga

Hinintay ko siya baka lang natraffic
Pati si loons wala pa ba yan naman awit
Tinawag ng bantay si anygma daw nagalit
At ang sabi sakin pinapaalis ka ni aric

Ang sabi ko ganon ba di nako nagtanong pa
Sana lang hinarap nya ko gusto ko mangamusta
Kahit di na bigyan ng laban ay wala kong pake
Basta matapos yung gabi na maayos kami

Kaso eto na yung ending ni tanga 
Pero ang bait ni kuya dennis talaga
Ba’t kapa pumunta eh ekis ka na nga
Diyos nga nagpapatawad ay atheist ka pala

Tinanggap ko kahit na masakit
At least malinaw na di na ako makakabalik
Namiss ko yung yanig, pagod at stress
Lam kong maraming sabik kay battousaipekz

But i guess this is the end
Di na kailangan icallout sa big event
Hinihiling kasi pag bumanat hindi bitin
Pag FT alam mong hindi titipirin kalaban titirisin

Shoutout sa mga bago hindi pabulong
Mindanao, visayas pati sa luzon
Dire diretso lang wag magningas kugon
“Nauubos na yung magaling” mali ako don

Sa mga tagahanga na nanunuod sa akin
Hinugot nyo ako sa kumunoy na malalim
di ko man matupad na mga bulong sa hangin
Gusto kong malaman nyo kayo bumuo sa akin

Sa buhay natin kailangan ng sakripisyo
Upang marating ang sariling paraiso
Meron dahilan kung bakit natatalisod
May plano ang Diyos kung bakit ka nandirito

Pasensya na kahit hilutin ko kapos
Eto na yung huling minuto ko tapos
Salamat aric ang buti mo na boss
Salamat fliptop mi ultimo adios

Outro

My life ain't so bad  
You drive so fast  
To the silence, baby  
Don't trip, relax
And we'll be alright  
’Til the sunrise

#tuldok #apekz #apekztuldok

Dagdag mo pa gawain nung mga hurado
Tensionado, emosyon, pressure halo-halo
Kaya sa entablado nagmukha akong barumbado

Lumipas ang tatlong taon
Siguro nawala yung mga tampo ngayon
Fliptop anniversary nag ayang pumunta don
Para magpakumbaba at masabi ko yung rason

Walang driver si loons kaya di nakasabay
Sumama ako kay zaki sa grab ay sumakay
Kahit di imbitado pumunta pasaway
Para personal mag sorry at makipagkamay

Bumili ng sariling alak at ng mangunguya
Para di masabi na ang kapal naman ng mukha
Nandun din lahat ng pasimple na nangungutya
Pero balewala gold label yung tinutungga

Hinintay ko siya baka lang natraffic
Pati si loons wala pa ba yan naman awit
Tinawag ng bantay si anygma daw nagalit
At ang sabi sakin pinapaalis ka ni aric

Ang sabi ko ganon ba di nako nagtanong pa
Sana lang hinarap nya ko gusto ko mangamusta
Kahit di na bigyan ng laban ay wala kong pake
Basta matapos yung gabi na maayos kami

Kaso eto na yung ending ni tanga 
Pero ang bait ni kuya dennis talaga
Ba’t kapa pumunta eh ekis ka na nga
Diyos nga nagpapatawad ay atheist ka pala

Tinanggap ko kahit na masakit
At least malinaw na di na ako makakabalik
Namiss ko yung yanig, pagod at stress
Lam kong maraming sabik kay battousaipekz

But i guess this is the end
Di na kailangan icallout sa big event
Hinihiling kasi pag bumanat hindi bitin
Pag FT alam mong hindi titipirin kalaban titirisin

Shoutout sa mga bago hindi pabulong
Mindanao, visayas pati sa luzon
Dire diretso lang wag magningas kugon
“Nauubos na yung magaling” mali ako don

Sa mga tagahanga na nanunuod sa akin
Hinugot nyo ako sa kumunoy na malalim
di ko man matupad na mga bulong sa hangin
Gusto kong malaman nyo kayo bumuo sa akin

Sa buhay natin kailangan ng sakripisyo
Upang marating ang sariling paraiso
Meron dahilan kung bakit natatalisod
May plano ang Diyos kung bakit ka nandirito

Pasensya na kahit hilutin ko kapos
Eto na yung huling minuto ko tapos
Salamat aric ang buti mo na boss
Salamat fliptop mi ultimo adios

Outro

My life ain't so bad  
You drive so fast  
To the silence, baby  
Don't trip, relax
And we'll be alright  
’Til the sunrise

#tuldok #apekz #apekztuldok

snippet.title: Sirius - No more Brawl Stars! (Brawl Stars Animation)
snippet.description:
🫷No more Brawl Stars! 🫸

Sirius, The First Star of Starr Park is here!

🌟 Get 20 Boxes in the Sirius Release event to unlock the Brawler
⭐️ 99 Brawler win Quests! If you have all 99 Brawler you can also get 1 win with each of them to unlock Sirius!
✨ Completing these Quests also rewards you with Sirius-themed cosmetics and 1 Sirius Box!
🔥 Sirius' Hypercharge is out today as well!
💥 New game mode: SHADOW SMASH!
🗓️ Lucky Daily Wins today!

Download NOW!! ►► https://supr.cl/2K62CZG
Subscribe!! ►► https://supr.cl/subscribe

An epic battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across various game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers, Gadgets and Gears! 
Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It’s a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don’t let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team’s safe and try to crack open your opponents’. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers, Gadgets! and Gears! Level them up and collect unique skins!

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season!

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you’re the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future!

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don’t want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device’s settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support — or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent’s Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/
